---
title: Brazil's agrotoxic use per year
data: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: darkly
    highlight: zenburn
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: show
params:
  columns: ["Year","Area","Value"] #Change what columns you want to analyze
---
```{r library, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r config}
file_path <- here("pasta", "arquivo") 
Target_columns <- params$columns 
```

```{r data_loading}
Raw_Data <- read.csv(file_path)
mutated_Data <- Raw_Data |>
  filter(as.integer(Raw_Data, Year > 2023)) |>
  
```
